metaTitle: PDF Compressor — Shrink PDF File Size (Free, Private & Offline)
metaDescription: Reduce your PDF file size instantly in your browser while maintaining quality. 100% private — your files never leave your device. Perfect for email attachments.
introSummary: Our professional PDF Compressor is the ultimate tool for optimizing your digital documents without compromising security. Whether you are preparing a large business proposal for email, uploading a thesis to an academic portal, or archiving years of tax records, our tool handles it all on-device. Using advanced client-side compression algorithms, we ensure your sensitive files are never uploaded to a cloud server, providing a lightning-fast, 'Zero-Knowledge' optimization experience.

contextUsage.title: For Email Attachments
contextUsage.desc: Quickly shrink oversized reports or portfolios to stay under the 25MB limit of Gmail and other major email providers.

contextUsage.title: For Government & Web Portals
contextUsage.desc: Easily meet strict file size requirements for tax filings, visa applications, or job portals without losing text clarity.

contextUsage.title: For Mobile Data Saving
contextUsage.desc: Optimize heavy documents before sending them to colleagues on mobile devices to save their data and ensure faster opening times.

howto.description: Drag and drop your PDF document or click to browse. Files are processed locally in your browser—no waiting for long uploads.
Adjust the optimization slider to balance file size and visual quality. Our tool provides instant feedback on the target size.
Click 'Compress PDF'. Our engine re-encodes internal streams and optimizes images directly on your CPU using your device's power.
Save the compressed PDF instantly. The original file remains untouched on your device throughout the entire process.

why: Absolute Privacy — Your documents are never sent to a server. Compression happens entirely within your browser's local sandbox.
Intelligent Downsampling — We optimize high-resolution images while preserving text sharpness, ensuring your documents remain professional.
Extreme Speed — By avoiding the upload/download cycle, our on-device engine completes most tasks faster than cloud-based competitors.
Multi-Level Optimization — Control the compression intensity to get the exact file size you need for specific platform requirements.
100% Free & No Watermarks — Enjoy professional-grade compression without subscriptions, hidden fees, or branding added to your files.
Battery Efficient — Optimized for modern laptops (like i5-8265U), our engine uses hardware resources wisely to minimize energy drain.

faq.q: Will my PDF lose quality after compression?
faq.a: Our tool uses 'Smart Compression' which targets heavy images first. Text remains as vector data, ensuring it stays perfectly sharp at any zoom level.

faq.q: Is there a file size limit for compression?
faq.a: There is no hard software limit. Since processing happens in your RAM, you can compress files as large as your device's memory allows.

faq.q: How does it work without an internet connection?
faq.a: The entire compression engine is loaded into your browser once. After that, you can turn off your Wi-Fi and the tool will still function perfectly.
You must unlock the PDF before compression. This allows the local script to access and optimize the internal data streams safely.

faq.q: Can I compress multiple PDFs at once?
faq.a: Currently, we focus on high-quality single-file optimization. For batch processing, stay tuned for our upcoming 'Batch Compressor' update.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Reduces DPI while maintaining high visual fidelity
Data is automatically cleared from RAM when the tab is closed
Compatible with all modern PDF versions and readers
Background processing to prevent the browser UI from freezing

troubleshooting: Compression failing? Ensure your PDF is not corrupted and is not a 'Read-Only' file which can block local script access.
Browser freezing? If you are compressing an extremely large file (100MB+), close other browser tabs to free up more RAM for the process.
File size didn't change much? Some PDFs are already optimized. If there are no images to downsample, the file may already be at its minimum size.
proTips: For documents with lots of photos, use 'High Compression' to see the biggest reduction in file size.
If you're merging files first, merge them all using our 'PDF Merger' and then compress the final result for maximum efficiency.
Use our tool to 'sanitize' files—re-encoding them locally can sometimes remove unnecessary hidden metadata from other PDF software.
